## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Infrastructure change

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Database/migrations
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

List the checks you ran:

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or short clips for UI changes.

## Migration Notes

Describe database migrations, seed changes, or deployment considerations.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated documentation where behavior changed.
- [ ] I avoided committing secrets or local environment files.
- [ ] I considered role-based access and sensitive payroll data where relevant.
